title: Capture a thought
description: Start with ; to save a thought straight to Today without opening anything.

title: Jump to Today
description: Press Space as the first key on the empty main menu to open your Day Page.

title: Mention context with @
description: Type @ to stage files, pages, and other context for AI.

title: Slash commands
description: Type / to browse and run commands directly.

title: Filter with key:value
description: Narrow results with filters like kind:.

title: Ask AI about anything
description: Select any row and press Cmd+Enter to open Agent Chat with it staged as context.

examples.note: Opens Agent Chat about that item

title: Quick AI question
description: Tap {mainHotkey} twice to open a clean Agent Chat with no context attached.

title: Actions menu
description: Press Cmd+K to see everything you can do with the focused item.

hint: Typing searches scripts, notes, clipboard, history
title: One search, every source
description: Plain typing searches scripts, flows, Brain notes, clipboard history, and browser history together.

examples.note: Hits scripts, Brain, and history at once
